docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY WONG, COLLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT U.S. AIRWAYS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO ANY EMPLOYEE, U.S. AIRWAYS, S.F. INT'L AIRPORT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO U.S. AIRWAYS RETURNED TO COURT INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES & COSTS FILED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, COLLEEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT U.S. AIRWAYS IT IS ORDERED THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT U.S. AIRWAYS AND THAT PLAINTIFF COLLEEN WONG ALSO KNOWN AS YAT CY WONG, SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF HER SMALL CLAIMS ACTION. EACH PARTY IS TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS OF SUIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO U.S. AIRWAYS RETURNED TO COURT INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS RETURN TO SENDER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-06-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-15-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED BECAUSE OF CCP 170.6 CHALLENGE BY PLTF. TO EPT. 206 ON 2/15/06 AT 9:00 A.M. VERA HAS FILE.
PER DEPT 206, PARTIES TO COME BACK AT 2/15/06 AT 9:00AM. ASSIGNED TO JUDGE WICK DEPT 611 AT 10:30AM.
